name: hero-proto — Phase 2 launch dashboard
description: Acceptance-criteria insights for hero-proto Phase 2 analytics. Import via PostHog Settings → Project → Apps → Import dashboard, or copy individual insights manually. All filters scope to env=prod by default — change to env=staging or remove the filter for full visibility.

insights.name: Daily active users
insights.description: Unique distinct_id per day on any event. Phase 2 acceptance: dashboard shows live events from staging walkthrough.

insights.name: First-purchase funnel — register → first stage clear → first purchase
First-fight funnel — register → first stage start → first stage clear
Pull-to-battle funnel — register → first summon → first stage start
insights.description: Catches players who pull but never fight.

insights.name: Daily bonus claim — total per day
insights.description: Retention loop signal. Watch for streak_after distribution and was_reset rate as separate insights.

insights.name: Pull rarity distribution — summon_x10 best_rarity
insights.description: Stacked bar by best_rarity property. Sanity-check pity + rarity weights match seed config.

insights.name: Stage progression — first_clear by stage_order
insights.description: Where players plateau. Bar chart, X = stage_order, Y = first_clear count. Look for cliffs.

insights.name: Arena win rate
insights.description: Daily count of arena_attack with won=true vs total. Should hover near 50% in a balanced bracket.

insights.name: Raid activity
insights.description: raid_attack per day, broken down by tier. Boss-defeat rate is a separate insight.

insights.name: Revenue — purchase_complete count by processor
insights.description: Stacked area by processor (mock / apple / google). Sum of price_cents is a separate insight using the SUM math + price_cents property.
